sql_array: CREATE TABLE user_permissions (uname VARCHAR(255), set_private BOOLEAN, permissions JSON);
INSERT INTO user_permissions (uname, set_private, permissions) VALUES ('test_user', TRUE, JSON_ARRAY('read', 'write'));

SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_DEFAULT_USER_PERMS_DEL(uname, set_private) FROM user_permissions WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(permissions, '"write"') AND uname = (SELECT uname FROM user_permissions WHERE set_private = TRUE LIMIT 1);
SELECT json_array_length(permissions) AS perm_count FROM (SELECT permissions FROM user_permissions WHERE uname = 'test_user') AS temp WHERE json_array_length(permissions) > 0;
UPDATE user_permissions SET permissions = JSON_ARRAY('read', 'execute') WHERE uname = 'test_user' AND json_array_length(permissions) < 3;

SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_DEFAULT_USER_PERMS_DEL(uname, set_private) FROM (SELECT uname, set_private FROM user_permissions WHERE uname NOT IN ('nobody', 'dba')) AS valid_users WHERE json_array_length(permissions) = (SELECT MAX(json_array_length(permissions)) FROM user_permissions);

SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_DEFAULT_USER_PERMS_DEL(uname, NOT set_private) FROM user_permissions WHERE (uname LIKE 'user%' OR set_private IS NULL) AND permissions IS NOT NULL ORDER BY json_array_length(permissions) DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_graph (graph_name VARCHAR(255), data JSON);
INSERT INTO test_graph (graph_name, data) VALUES ('example_graph', JSON_ARRAY('data1', NULL, 'data2'));
SELECT json_array_length(data) AS data_length FROM test_graph WHERE graph_name = 'example_graph' HAVING data_length > 1;
